# Support Guide

Welcome to the **Shipyard** support page. Please review the options below to find the best way to get help or ask questions.

---

## Technical Documentation
Before opening a request, check if your question is covered in the documentation:
*   [Setup & Installation Guide](../docs/SETUP.md)
*   [REST API Reference](../docs/API.md)
*   [System Architecture Guide](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)

---

## Where to Ask Questions

### 1. GitHub Issues
*   Use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Chait0001/Shipyard-project_Sde/issues) to report reproducible bugs or request specific feature enhancements.
*   **Do not** open issues for general setup assistance. Refer to setup documentation or contact the maintenance team directly.

### 2. Discussion Forum
For architectural discussions, configuration assistance, and general community discussions:
*   Join the [GitHub Discussions Forum](https://github.com/Chait0001/Shipyard-project_Sde/discussions) (if enabled).

### 3. Contact Maintainers
If you have commercial inquiries or private administrative concerns, contact the project lead:
*   **Chaitanya Kumar**: [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/Chait0001) or email **admin@shipyard-app.com**.
